summary: First testing run for Gelateria La Dolcevita MVP. Backend (10/10) and frontend critical flows all pass. Contact form submits, persists to MongoDB, returns 201 with email_sent=false and email_error 'RESEND_API_KEY non configurata' (intentional, key empty). Landing page loads all sections in Italian with correct anchor scrolling. Instagram URL matches required. Validation rejects bad payloads with 422. No _id leakage.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider FastAPI lifespan context for forward compatibility (non-blocking).
GET /api/contact is currently public and unauthenticated, exposing all inquiries (name/email/phone/message). For production, add auth/admin protection.

_build_email_html injects payload fields directly into HTML; safe because the email is sent server-side to staff, but consider HTML-escaping payload.name/subject/message to avoid downstream rendering issues if the inquiry log is shown elsewhere.
RECIPIENT_EMAIL defaults to info@ladolcevita.ch — verify domain ownership before enabling Resend key.
seed_data_creation: Tests create transient TEST_-prefixed inquiries directly via POST /api/contact (no separate seeding).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_contact_api.py covers health, contact create (general+catering), validation (missing/empty name, invalid email, missing/empty message, invalid inquiry_type), and list. Frontend Playwright verified: 5 flavor cards, 3 review cards, 5 navbar anchors (#valori #gusti #prodotti #esperienza #contatti), sonner toast 'Richiesta ricevuta!' on submit, catering toggle works, map iframe present, Instagram URL is https://www.instagram.com/ladolcevita.gelateria/?hl=en. When RESEND_API_KEY is later configured, re-test that email_sent=true.
